title: SPBR-LegacyCompatibility
description: Handle issues with SPBR loading in older versions of Minecraft.
body:
# SPBR LegacyCompatibility  
This pack madr to handle issues with SPBR loading in older versions of Minecraft.  
This is a Patch Pack for [SPBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spbr)  
**This Pack is made under LabPBR standard**  
If you want to use this pack you need a LabPBR supported Shader.  
And should put it _above_ the SPBR Main Pack
![Hanging Sign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k2wExEDz/images/6d22579edffac0e3561ba79b93d256f6e42dbe36.jpeg)
_This Pack Can Be Use Alone._
